CustomField.description: tells you the days at this stage as a number
CustomField.formula: ROUND( CASE( TEXT(Status__c) ,'Open', NOW() - BLANKVALUE(fxLastDateOpen__c ,InteractionDate__c ) ,'Working', NOW() - BLANKVALUE(fxLastDateWorking__c ,InteractionDate__c) , 0 ) ,2)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: tells you the days at this stage as a number
CustomField.label: fxTimeInStage
